assessment: This repository is primarily an interactive React learning module. It does not contain separate lecture JSON, board-prep JSON, or histology media bundles. The reusable educational content is embedded in TSX source modules.
contentCategoriesFound: instructional design modules (analysis, design, development, evaluation)
notableGaps: No standalone lecture dataset was present.
No board-prep content JSON or syllabus export was present.
No histology image manifest or image asset bundle was present.
Content is coupled to React components, so reuse requires component-level extraction rather than raw data import.
